data.description: The strategy.continue-on-error: true added to ticket-platform-matrix.yml allows all matrix legs to run regardless of failures, but means a silently failing leg does not block the workflow. Consider adding an explicit required-checks entry or a post-run aggregation step to surface partial failures. Filed from review finding on PR adding required-checks.txt.
data.title: CI: continue-on-error:true on ticket-platform-matrix may mask intermittent failures
